electronics.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Industry Leading Noise Canceling Headphones with Auto Noise Canceling Optimizer, Crystal Clear Hands-Free Calling, and Alexa Voice Control, Black
bullet_points: Industry-leading noise canceling with two processors and 8 microphones for a premium listening experience even on calls
Crystal clear hands-free calling: 4 beamforming microphones and bone conduction sensor with precise voice pickup in calls
Up to 30 hours battery life with quick charging (3 min charge for 3 hours of playback)
Ultra-comfortable design with a newly redesigned headband and soft fit leather for all-day listening
Multipoint connection allows pairing with 2 devices simultaneously — seamlessly switch between devices
electronics.description: The WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones take noise canceling to the next level with two processors controlling 8 microphones for unrivaled noise cancellation across a wider sound range.

electronics.title: Bose QuietComfort 45 Bluetooth Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones — Over Ear Headphones with Microphone, Up to 24 Hours of Battery Life, White Smoke
bullet_points: NOISE CANCELLING HEADPHONES: Proprietary Bose technology measures, compares, and reacts to outside noise, canceling it with opposite signals
HIGH FIDELITY AUDIO: A carefully tuned suite of microphones and speakers deliver quiet and clear audio, whether you're listening to music or on a call
ALL-DAY BATTERY: 24 hours of battery life — whether you're commuting, on a flight, or in the office all day
AWARE MODE: Let in your surroundings without removing your headphones — toggle between full noise cancellation and Aware Mode with a single tap
COMFORTABLE FIT: Refined design with plush ear cushions and soft materials for hours of fatigue-free listening
electronics.description: Bose QuietComfort 45 headphones balance quiet and sound, helping you tune out the world when you need it most.

electronics.title: Apple AirPods Max Wireless Over-Ear Headphones, Active Noise Cancelling, Transparency Mode, Personalized Spatial Audio, Dolby Atmos, Bluetooth Headphones for iPhone — Midnight
bullet_points: Stunning high-fidelity audio: 40mm Apple-designed dynamic driver delivers incredibly detailed acoustics with ultra-low distortion
Active Noise Cancellation: Industry-leading ANC uses computational audio to produce an immersive listening experience
Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you for an immersive listening experience like you're in a theater
Transparency mode lets you hear and interact with the world around you without removing your headphones
Up to 20 hours of listening time with Active Noise Cancellation and Transparency mode enabled
electronics.description: AirPods Max reimagines over-ear headphones. An Apple-designed dynamic driver provides incredible sound. ANC, Transparency mode, and Personalized Spatial Audio create a fully immersive listening experience.

grocery.title: Gain Flings Laundry Detergent Soap Pacs, Original Scent, HE Compatible
bullet_points: Laundry detergent pacs with detergent, Oxi Boost, and Febreze freshness in one
Original scent designed for long-lasting freshness after washing
Works in high-efficiency and standard washing machines
Pre-measured pac format helps reduce pouring and measuring mess
Use one pac for regular loads and follow package directions for larger loads
grocery.description: Gain Flings combine laundry detergent with scent and cleaning boosters in a convenient pre-measured pac.

grocery.title: Persil Discs Laundry Detergent Pacs, Original Scent, Stain-Fighting Clean
bullet_points: Pre-measured laundry detergent discs for everyday stain-fighting performance
Designed for bright whites and vibrant colors when used as directed
Compatible with high-efficiency and standard washing machines
Original scent leaves laundry fresh after the wash cycle
Convenient pac format helps simplify laundry routines
grocery.description: Persil Discs deliver concentrated detergent in a convenient pac format for strong cleaning performance.
